videos.headline: Carnell Tate rises over 2 Wisconsin defenders for an Ohio State TD
videos.description: Julian Sayin lets it fly to Carnell Tate for a fantastic Ohio State touchdown vs. Wisconsin.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Carnell Tate rises over 2 Wisconsin defenders for an Ohio State TD) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Julian Sayin finds Carnell Tate for their 2nd TD connection
videos.description: Julian Sayin and Carnell Tate connect for the pair's second touchdown for Ohio State vs. Wisconsin.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Julian Sayin finds Carnell Tate for their 2nd TD connection) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Julian Sayin floats a TD pass to Will Kacmarek for Ohio State
videos.description: Julian Sayin lobs a touchdown pass to Will Kacmarek for the Buckeyes vs. Wisconsin.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Julian Sayin floats a TD pass to Will Kacmarek for Ohio State) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Julian Sayin fires a TD to Brandon Inniss for Buckeyes
videos.description: Julian Sayin slings a touchdown pass to Brandon Inniss to extend Ohio State's lead over Wisconsin.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Julian Sayin fires a TD to Brandon Inniss for Buckeyes) 2025/10/18 ESHEET
